title: Christi Nicolay
compiled_truth: Christi Nicolay is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-06-15 to 2001-11-26), Christi Nicolay sent 219 and received 1047 emails, totalling 1266 interactions. Top correspondents: [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (122), [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (119), [Joe Hartsoe](people/joe-hartsoe) (106), [Sarah Novosel](people/sarah-novosel) (102), [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (89). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, california, compliments, deleted_items, eol, power.
